assessments.summary: Workspace-only orchestration with no approved external write paths.
primary_harms: unsafe build recommendation if validation is skipped
assessments.rollback_reference: local artifact rebuild and revert path
assessments.monitoring_reference: python validation, schema checks and unit tests

assessments.summary: Domain-bound plugin stays in observe_only, safe_mode or approval_required until exact license, source mapping and rollback conditions are green.
assessments.monitoring_reference: baseline snapshot, conflict picture, optimization gate

assessments.summary: Public portal remains informational, legal and guarded without public delivery, login or billing execution.
primary_harms: policy drift between legal and commercial copy
assessments.rollback_reference: revert portal templates and route map
assessments.monitoring_reference: public route tests, support and legal page assertions

assessments.summary: Protected billing-event receiver is limited to PayPal billing events and fails closed on invalid signature, replay suspicion, malformed payload or missing env refs.
primary_harms: scope confusion between marketing and billing routes
assessments.rollback_reference: disable webhook activation and hold release decisions
assessments.monitoring_reference: verification evidence, replay registry and routing state

assessments.summary: Protected fulfillment stays domain-bound, signed-delivery-prepared and approval-gated until payment, license, signature and operator release decision are all green.
assessments.rollback_reference: revoke release decision and keep protected delivery closed
assessments.monitoring_reference: payment, invoice, delivery and renewal state previews
